feedback.text: When buying a book, it is mine to keep irrelevant of any future intentions of the author or publisher. And I believe the law to some extent should emulate similar protection to digital media, such as videogames. I am aware that some media, namely live-service games, cannot function properly without servers, which cost the publishers resources to run. The request is not that they provide support indefinitely, but that I, as a customer, am able to continue support and keep my product functional at my own expense after the publisher decides to withdraw support from any reason.
